seed_instruction: Write a story about a house where every room leads to a different year in time.
org_constraint: The story must contain exactly 500 words.
new_constraint: The story must consist of three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing at most 150 words.
instruction: Write a story about a house where every room leads to a different year in time. The story must contain exactly 500 words. The story must consist of three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing at most 150 words.
